reviews.review_description: the game status is pretty good but you can not connect to the same sever as everyone else
It’s fun but the chair is a bit buggy but over all really good gam what berry made I like it.
It so cool trust you have to play it ok plz download it ok cuz I am ok with an ok ok remember to download the game ok or the ok will be ok with you

There is so many great features they have only up, shop, anti gravity, and even HORROR plus there is SO MANY cool cosmetics, that I personally think look GREAT,  such as a Bowl of bananas you can wear on your head all the way up to a Halo with wings there’s even a secret cosmetic hidden somewhere in the map but I won’t expose it since that’s no fun anyways good luck and have fun in gorilla playground 🙂.
